articles.title_en: Russian Geran drones wipes out Ukrainian fuel depot in Dnepropetrovsk Region
articles.lead_en: The strikes were followed by a strong fire, the Russian defense ministry said
articles.title_raw: Russian Geran drones wipes out Ukrainian fuel depot in Dnepropetrovsk Region
articles.lead_raw: The strikes were followed by a strong fire, the Russian defense ministry said

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces "Geraniums" destroyed a fuel depot of the Ukrainian Armed Forces in the Dnepropetrovsk region
articles.lead_en: The impact destroyed several fuel storage facilities, the Russian Ministry of Defense noted.
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ "Геранями" уничтожили склад топлива ВСУ в Днепропетровской области
articles.lead_raw: При ударе было разрушено несколько объектов хранилища ГСМ, отметили в Минобороны РФ

articles.title_en: Crimea halts all public gasoline sales, restricts fuel to government agencies
articles.lead_en: All gas stations in Crimea have completely stopped selling fuel, both for general sale and on ration coupons, announced Sergei Aksyonov, the Russian-installed head of the peninsula.
articles.title_raw: Crimea halts all public gasoline sales, restricts fuel to government agencies
articles.lead_raw: All gas stations in Crimea have completely stopped selling fuel, both for general sale and on ration coupons, announced Sergei Aksyonov, the Russian-installed head of the peninsula.

articles.title_en: Ukrainian Strikes on Russian-Annexed Crimea Kill 4, Pause Fuel Sales
articles.lead_en: Ukraine said it targeted military and energy facilities in Crimea in one of the biggest attacks on the peninsula in recent months.
articles.title_raw: Ukrainian Strikes on Russian-Annexed Crimea Kill 4, Pause Fuel Sales
articles.lead_raw: Ukraine said it targeted military and energy facilities in Crimea in one of the biggest attacks on the peninsula in recent months.

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit oil refining facilities and the fuel and energy complex of Ukraine
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили объекты нефтепереработки и ТЭК Украины

articles.title_en: Russian forces strike Ukraine’s key energy sites in Kiev, Sumy, Chernigov regions, DPR
articles.lead_en: The Russian Armed Forces used Gerbera drones, the Defense Ministry reported
articles.title_raw: Russian forces strike Ukraine’s key energy sites in Kiev, Sumy, Chernigov regions, DPR
articles.lead_raw: The Russian Armed Forces used Gerbera drones, the Defense Ministry reported

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit important energy facilities used by the Armed Forces of Ukraine
articles.lead_en: In particular, Russian troops hit targets in the Kyiv, Sumy, and Chernigov regions
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили важные используемые ВСУ энергообъекты
articles.lead_raw: В частности, российские войска поразили объекты в Киевской, Сумской, Черниговской областях

articles.title_en: EU demands Turkey does not supply Russian gas to union
articles.lead_en: As German Economy Minister Katherina Reiche noted, Turkey takes into account the great importance that the EU places "on weaning itself off Russian commodity supplies," but made it clear that replacing Russian supplies is impossible overnight
articles.title_raw: EU demands Turkey does not supply Russian gas to union
articles.lead_raw: As German Economy Minister Katherina Reiche noted, Turkey takes into account the great importance that the EU places "on weaning itself off Russian commodity supplies," but made it clear that replacing Russian supplies is impossible overnight

articles.title_en: The EU demanded that Turkey exclude Russian gas from new supplies to the bloc
articles.lead_en: However, Türkiye has made it clear that replacing Russian supplies is not possible overnight, either from an economic point of view or from the point of view of available resources, said the head of the German Ministry of Economy, Katerina Reiche.
articles.title_raw: ЕС потребовал от Турции исключить российский газ из новых поставок блоку
articles.lead_raw: Однако Турция ясно дала понять, что замена российских поставок невозможна в одночасье ни с экономической точки зрения, ни с точки зрения имеющихся ресурсов, заявила глава Минэкономики ФРГ Катерина Райхе

articles.title_en: In Donbass and Novorossia, 25 power engineers died due to the Ukrainian Armed Forces
articles.title_raw: В Донбассе и Новороссии из-за ВСУ погибли 25 энергетиков

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit energy and transport facilities of the Armed Forces of Ukraine in one day
articles.lead_en: The targets were eliminated by operational-tactical aviation, attack unmanned aerial vehicles, missile forces and artillery
articles.title_raw: ВС РФ поразили за сутки объекты энергетики и транспорта ВСУ
articles.lead_raw: Цели ликвидировали оперативно-тактической авиацией, ударными беспилотными летательными аппаратами, ракетными войсками и артиллерией

articles.title_en: Ministry of Internal Affairs: scammers began to convince victims to call “technical support” back with the sound of sirens
articles.lead_en: Attackers force Russians to transfer money to a “safe account” through QR codes, which actually lead to payment for purchases in the store, the department says.
articles.title_raw: МВД: мошенники стали убеждать жертв перезвонить в "техподдержку" звуком сирен
articles.lead_raw: Злоумышленники заставляют россиян перевести на "безопасный счет" деньги через QR-коды, которые на самом деле ведут на оплату покупок в магазине, говорится в материалах ведомства
